Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Pre-ICL Cost-sharing CHAR 1 X X X
REDUCED_OOPT_CS Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Post Out-of-Pocket (OOP) Threshold Cost-Sharing Amounts CHAR 1 X X X
INCREASED_ICL Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Increased Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) Amount CHAR 1 X X X
OTC_UM_PROGRAM Part D Plan Covers Over-the-Counter (OTC) Medications under the Utilization Management Program CHAR 1 X X X
1 For all columns under "Year of Data File": X = variable
